title: Dual Förster resonance energy transfer and morphology control to boost the power conversion efficiency of all-polymer OPVs
abstract: Dual Förster resonance energy transfer was developed in a PTB7-Th (donor)/P(NDI2OD-T2) (accepter)/PF12TBT (the third component) ternary blend system.
